title: verbascum × denudatum
intro: Verbascum × denudatum, also known as the common mullein, is a biennial plant that is a hybrid of Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Verbascum × denudatum include soothing coughs, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in treating wounds and burns. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a versatile and effective herbal remedy.
